violations.text: Milk Cooler door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2025
Pre flush hose observed hanging below flood line. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets (milk cooler) were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2025

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3-bay sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2025
Facility is lacking hot water for the handsink. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2024
Spray hose at 3 bay sink is in poor repair. Observed missing the ring attachment to secure hose. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

Soap was not dispensing at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. PIC to contact facilities. New Violation. Correct By: 10/18/2023

Food was observed being delivered by on-campus Commissary kitchen on a golf cart without proper cold-holding during inspection. PIC informed inspector that they will use insulated bags for delivery going forward. New Violation. Correct By: 10/18/2023
